data.title: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Sours On Blade Runner 2049 After EV Giant Gets Sued Over 'False Endorsement' Accusations: 'That Movie Sucked'
data.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk on Tuesday slammed Alcon Entertainment's Blade Runner 2049 movie after the Los Angeles-based production company alleged copyright infringement during Tesla's robotaxi event.

data.title: Female Cannabis Consumers Outspend Men: How Tilray And High Tide Are Responding
data.description: Young women now lead cannabis consumption in the U.S., prompting retailers to adapt their products and strategies to meet this demand.

data.title: Tesla's Fancy Data And Computing Claims Likely Will Not Impress Investors: Gary Black Highlights Drastic Jump In EV Disengagement Rates And Missing Robotaxi Details As Key Question
data.description: Future Fund LLC Managing Partner Gary Black anticipates Tesla's upcoming earnings call will face scrutiny over several critical business segments, particularly the company's autonomous driving capabilities and vehicle profitability targets.

data.title: Cathie Wood-Led Ark Dumps $5.8M Worth Of Robinhood Shares Amid Forecasts Of A Potential Rally From Analysts
data.description: On Tuesday, Cathie Wood's Ark Invest sold 210,483 shares of Robinhood Markets Inc., worth approximately $5.8 million, alongside key trades involving Moderna, Tempus AI, CRISPR Therapeutics, and Cerus Corp.

data.title: SoftBank-Backed Arm Threatens To Cancel Qualcomm's Chip Design License Ahead Of Trial In December
data.description: Qualcomm has been threatened by Arm Holdings with cancelation of its chip design license, leaving the San Diego-based semiconductor giant with 60 days notice.
